name: Kaaj
oneliner: Agentic AI credit intelligence platform that deploys coordinated AI agents to automate end-to-end small business loan underwriting — from business verification to risk assessment — in under 3 minutes.
finserv: Directly in financial services: lenders and brokers as customers, $5B+ in loan applications already processed. Clients include Amur Equipment Finance, Quality Equipment Finance, Fundr.
team: Utsav Shah (CEO, decade at Uber and Cruise building AI decision systems); Shivi Sharma (President, ex-American Express, Uber, Varo Bank). Backed by Kindred Ventures, Better Tomorrow Ventures.
thesis: Kaaj demonstrates agentic AI running regulated lending decisions at $5B+ production volume at seed stage — proof the agentic finance gap is moving from prototype to live. The team pedigree (Uber AI + Varo Bank) bridges consumer fintech credibility with institutional finance.
evidence: Kaaj Raises $3.8M to Expand Access to Capital
